base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of game_over_screen — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 mega man. 'GAME OVER' screen with CONTINUE / STAGE SELECT options. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'GAME OVER' screen with CONTINUE / STAGE SELECT options
